hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE_PATH" == *.py ]]; then .venv/bin/ruff format --quiet "$FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null; fi
FILE_PATH=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '(\.db$|\.venv/|requirements\.txt$)'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit this file directly' >&2; exit 2; fi
